title: FORECLOSURE COUNSELING AND HOME BUYER EDUCATION - 211info
text: COMMUNITY CONNECTION OF NORTHEAST OREGON INC ADMINISTRATION OFFICE FORECLOSURE COUNSELING AND HOME BUYER EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides state- and HUD-approved mortgage delinquency and default resolution counseling, one-on-one pre-purchase counseling, and first-time home buyer workshops. Provides Individual Development Accounts (IDA) for first-time home buyers, obtaining rental housing and vehicle. 2802 Adams Avenue La Grande, OR 97850 Eligibility: Call for information Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 963-3186 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 963-3186 Administration Main phone (541) 963-3186 Person (541) 963-3186 ext 1007 Susy Mcbride [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Credit check fee may apply DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Baker, Grant, Union, and Wallowa Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-4pm Services: Homebuyer/Home Purchase Counseling HUD Approved Counseling Agencies Individual Development Accounts Mortgage Delinquency and Default Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - AREA AGENCY ON AGING COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HEALTH PROMOTION AND DISEASE PREVENTION HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING REHABILITATION LOANS HOUSING/SHELTER - WEATHERIZATION ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COMMUNITY CONNECTION OF NORTHEAST OREGON INC ADMINISTRATION OFFICE
